Module 2:
Launch Story Themes
!
Executive Summary
Story themes have been proven over the years. Themes help “humanize”
your marketing and will put you in the same plane as people watching your
launch.
For example, in Star Wars you have a classic hero’s journey. Luke
Skywalker starts off as a boy and grows into a man and hero, so you
identify with him throughout.
You can use different themes in different parts of your launch, and yes, you
can use more than one theme. The more you use these themes the better
your launch will perform.
In the end, authenticity wins - being honest in your marketing stories is key.
!
Themes
1) Reluctant Hero
• 	This is when you’re reluctantly pushed into creating the product/
training
• 	I’ve used this often successfully
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

2) Loss and redemption
• 	You had something great and then for some reason you lost it
• 	But you came back even better and more powerful
3) Underdog
• 	Ex: fighting something in your industry or a common enemy
• 	Usually not used throughout the entire launch
• 	People love to root for underdogs
4) Discovery
• 	Your origin story - how you got where you are and how you learned
5) Curation
• 	You’ve studied and learned from all the great teachers and curated
the learnings
• 	Ex: Think and Grow Rich - Napoleon Hill interviewed all the most
successful people in the world.
6) Revenge
• 	A powerful emotion/story, but you have to be careful.
• 	The revenue should align with your prospects and their self-interests
• 	Then move from revenge to serving your people
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 2 of 3 --

7) Ascension
• 	Rags to riches story
• 	A very personal story about you
!
